title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.534 - Roger "Dusty" Shaw Memorial Bridge designated for the bridge on State Highway 99 crossing over Eleven Point River in Thomasville in Oregon County
text:
227.534.  Roger "Dusty" Shaw Memorial Bridge designated for the bridge on State Highway 99 crossing over Eleven Point River in Thomasville in Oregon County. — The bridge on State Highway 99 crossing over Eleven Point River in Thomasville in Oregon County shall be designated as the "Roger " Dusty " Shaw Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain signs designating such bridge, with the cost of such designation to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2017 S.B. 64 § 1 merged with S.B. 322 § 2)
